retry_reason: Failure occurs when the context is not found or its refcount is zero (object dying); retrying will not change the outcome.
contract_summary: RCU-protected get-wrapper: looks up a context by ID from file_priv's context_xarray, and if found with a non-zero refcount, acquires a reference via kref_get_unless_zero. Returns the context pointer with an elevated refcount, or NULL if not found or the object is dying. The caller must drop the reference with a corresponding put (e.g., i915_gem_context_put) when done. The RCU read lock is only held during the lookup and get; the caller need not hold it after return.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to look up a context by ID and conditionally acquire a reference; the only operations are xa_load and kref_get_unless_zero, no extraneous business logic.

check.reason: kref_get_unless_zero(&ctx->ref) acquires a reference on ctx->ref, and ctx is returned. The access path ctx.ref.refcount.refs correctly traces from the returned pointer to the atomic refcount field. The type chain i915_gem_context--kref--refcount_t--atomic_t matches the actual structure definitions and the callee's type chain.
